name: Pan Broiled Flank Steak
recipeIngredient: 12 ounces flank steak, at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat an iron skillet over high heat and scatter coarse salt on the bottom of the pan.
2. Add the steak to the hot skillet and pan broil for 4 to 5 minutes per side for rare, or 6 to 7 minutes per side for medium. Do not cook until well done; the steak will become tough and chewy if overcooked.
3. Remove the steak from the pan when it reaches your desired doneness and transfer it to a cutting board. Let it rest for one minute before slicing.
4. Cut the steak across the grain into broad, thin slices.
Yield: 2 servings
